name: Itera ASA
summary: Itera ASA, together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, and operates digital solutions for companies and organizations in Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Slovakia, and Ukraine. It delivers projects and services in the consulting and strategy, design and development, and operations and management areas. The company also provides strategic advisory, design and development, and managed cloud services, as well as hosting and operations, and infrastructure services. It primarily serves clients in insurance, banking and finance, high tech, energy, media, and public sectors. Itera ASA was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
